memoryArtifacts.headline: Benjamin Higgins of Eastham
memoryArtifacts.description:
BENJAMIN HIGGINS (ROBERT 1, RICHARD 2) 

b. July 1640 Eastham, MA
m. 24 Dec. 1661 Eastham, LYDIA BANGS (d. after 13 Feb. 1706/7)
d. 14 Mar. 1690/1 Eastham, MA

From the Eastham vital records:

Benjami …

memoryArtifacts.headline:
Benjamin Higgins
(1 July 1640 – 14 March 1691)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Benjamin, 2nd & last known child of Richard Higgins by his 1st wife, was born at Plymouth June 1640. 

He married at Eastham 24 December 1661 Lydia Bangs, daughter of Edward Bangs.

Richard son of Ben …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Benjamin Higgins Sr.於1640年7月1日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯時，他的父親Richard Higgins36歲，母親Lydia Chandler27歲。他於1661年12月24日與Lydia Bangs在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼易亞斯坦結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1688年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦被列為selectman at eastham。他去世於1691年3月14日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Benjamin Higgins Sr.于1640年7月1日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯时，他的父亲Richard Higgins36岁，母亲Lydia Chandler27岁。他于1661年12月24日与Lydia Bangs在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼易亞斯坦结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1688年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦被列为selectman at eastham。他去世于1691年3月14日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Higgins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hUiginn ‘descendant of Uiginn’, a byname meaning ‘viking, sea-rover’ (from Old Norse víkingr). Compare McGuigan .

English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Higgin, itself either a Lancashire variant of Huggin (from a pet form of Hugh ), or a variant of Hickin (from a pet form of Richard ), with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. See Hick and compare Higson .

variants.name: McGuigan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Mairead.
Irish (northern): perhaps an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Uiginn ‘son of the viking’ (see Higgins 1).
Irish (northern): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Guagáin, a shortened form of Mag Eochagáin, son of Eochagán, a diminutive of Eochaidh ‘horseman’. Compare Geoghegan .

variants.name: Kiggins
meanings: Irish (Galway and Mayo) and Manx: shortened Anglicized form (with English excrescent -s) of Gaelic Mag Uiginn ‘son of the Viking’ (see Higgins ).

nameMeanings.name: Benjamin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the youngest of the twelve sons of Jacob. His mother Rachel died in giving birth to him, and in her last moments she named him Benoni, meaning ‘son of my sorrow’. His father, however, did not wish him to bear such an ill-omened name, and renamed him Benyamin (Genesis 35:16–18; 42:4). This means either ‘son of the right hand’ or more likely ‘son of the south’ (Hebrew yamin can also mean ‘south’), since Benjamin was the only child of Jacob born in Canaan and not in Mesopotamia to the north. Another tradition is that the second element of the name is a variant of the Hebrew plural noun yamim, which means ‘days’ but is used idiomatically to mean ‘year’ or ‘years’. The name would then mean ‘son of (my) old age’ and refer to the fact that Benjamin was Jacob's youngest child. In the Middle Ages the name was often given to sons whose mothers had died in childbirth. Today it has no such unfortunate associations and it grew enormously in popularity following the release of the film The Graduate ( 1967 ), in which Dustin Hoffman played the role of Benjamin Braddock . It is used in Scotland as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Beathan .

en.lifeSummary: When Benjamin Higgins Sr. was born on 1 July 1640, in Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Richard Higgins, was 36 and his mother, Lydia Chandler, was 27. He married Lydia Bangs on 24 December 1661, in Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. In 1688, at the age of 48, his occupation is listed as selectman at eastham in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. He died on 14 March 1691, in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Benjamin Higgins Sr. est né le 1 juillet 1640, à Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Richard Higgins, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Lydia Chandler, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Lydia Bangs le 24 décembre 1661, à Eastham, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. En 1688, à l’âge de 48 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est selectman at eastham à Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il est décédé le 14 mars 1691, à Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Benjamin Higgins Sr. am 1. Juli 1640 in Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Higgins 36 und seine Mutter Lydia Chandler 27. Er hat am 24. Dezember 1661 in Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America Lydia Bangs geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1688, als er 48 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als selectman at eastham in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America aufgeführt. Er starb am 14. März 1691 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Benjamin Higgins Sr. è nato il il 1 luglio 1640 nel Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Richard Higgins, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Lydia Chandler, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Lydia Bangs il 24 dicembre 1661, nel Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1688, all'età di 48 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come selectman at eastham nel Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Morì il 14 marzo 1691, nel Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Brit: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウス
ja.lifeSummary: Benjamin Higgins Sr.が1640年7月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスで生まれた時，父Richard Higginsは36歳，母Lydia Chandlerは27歳であった。1661年12月24日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーエアスサムでLydia Bangsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1688年，48歳の時，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルエアスサムでの職業はselectman at easthamと記録されている。彼は1691年3月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルエアスサムで50歳で死去した。

ko.Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 플림우스
ko.Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬
ko.Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 이스섬
ko.Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬
ko.Eastham, Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, Br: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬
ko.Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Brit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스
ko.lifeSummary: Benjamin Higgins Sr.(이)가 1640년 7월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Higgins(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Lydia Chandler(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1661년 12월 24일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 이스섬에서 Lydia Bangs(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1688년, 48세의 나이로 그의 직업은 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬에서 selectman at eastham이었다. 그는 1691년 3월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Benjamin Higgins Sr. nasceu em 1 de julho de 1640, em Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Richard Higgins, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Lydia Chandler, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Lydia Bangs em 24 de dezembro de 1661, em Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1688, com 48 anos, sua profissão aparece como selectman at eastham em Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Ele faleceu em 14 de março de 1691, em Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Benjamin Higgins Sr. родился 1 июля 1640 г. в местности плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Richard Higgins было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Lydia Chandler, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Lydia Bangs 24 декабря 1661 г. в местности эастам, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. В 1688 году, в возрасте 48 лет,  он работал по профессии selectman at eastham в местности эастам, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер 14 марта 1691 г. в местности эастам, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Benjamin Higgins Sr. nació el 1 de julio de 1640, en Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Richard Higgins, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Lydia Chandler, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Lydia Bangs el 24 de diciembre de 1661, en Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1688, a la edad de 48 años, su ocupación registrada era selectman at eastham en Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Murió el 14 de marzo de 1691, en Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 50 años.
